decision_summary: Mission Control auto-start is approved as a canonical operator entrypoint.
rationale: The implementation reuses the existing visibility-session path, adds a discoverable mission-control command, refreshes the command registry, updates quickstart and CLI reference, and adds regression coverage without making read commands long-running.
recommendation: Close TASK-087 after final audits pass and keep visibility-session as the compatibility layer.
expected_user_reaction: Use node ./src/cli.js mission-control --project . --port 4174 --open-browser instead of manually wiring visibility-export and visibility-serve.
artifact_change_recommendations: Keep Mission Control as the named entrypoint for status visibility.
organization_change_recommendations: Treat mission-control as a top command in the command registry.
